summary: A 20-second public-safety warning in which a US Border Patrol official (Hugo Carmona, Acting Associate Chief, USBP Operations) speaks directly to camera against a plain black backdrop, warning of below-freezing temperatures along the US-Mexico border and urging migrants not to risk crossing the river or desert. It is a sober single-speaker spoken advisory with subtitles and no music or cinematic styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Extremely cold, below freezing temperatures; Hugo Carmona, Acting Associate Chief, USBP Operations; This is a warning of extreme importance.
